event_description: I do not have reliable knowledge of HealthStream Inc. (HSTM) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance disclosure, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure specifically tied to financial-reporting issues. HealthStream is a healthcare workforce/learning management software company, and based on my training data I recall no such disclosures or controversies associated with it.
